# MyFitnessPal: Diário alimentar · Fitness

Generated: Jul 22, 2026, 11:11 AM

## **Contents** {#toc}

- [Bugs and stability](#theme-bugs_stability)
- [Pricing and paywall](#theme-pricing_paywall)
- [Ads pressure](#theme-ads)


## **Bugs and stability** {#theme-bugs_stability}

   **Bugs and stability.**
      6 recent review(s) mention bugs and stability.
      Review window: May 6, 2026 - Jul 20, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users report reliability problems. This points to quality gaps competitors can exploit.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _Ted Manuer_, Jul 20, 2026, 1/5: "App freezes. Wont even open most of the time. Freezes on opening logo. Used to be great, not sure what's wrong."
            2. _Rebekah Holt_, Jul 19, 2026, 1/5: "App has become entirely unusable and seems to have spontaneously forgotten my account, now I can't log in or use it. It seems they've also locked the barcode scanner behind a pay wall, which definitely puts me off using it even if I do manage to regain access to my account! I used to recommend this to my friends, but I'll be warning them all to avoid now."
            3. _Ldycsi_, Jul 19, 2026, 1/5: "Last update made it glitchy, slow, and can’t search for foods. Have to add everything. Useless unless you pay them. I’ve been using the app for years. I felt loyal to it bc I dropped a ton of weight and got healthy with this as a tool. That’s over, I guess. What a pain in my a— it has become to log things! No thanks. I’ll find something else that isn’t seeking money people do not have to waste on a logging app that has ads! How much do you greedy b—ds need?!"

## **Pricing and paywall** {#theme-pricing_paywall}

   **Pricing and paywall.**
      5 recent review(s) mention pricing and paywall.
      Review window: Jul 10, 2026 - Jul 20, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users mention price, subscriptions, or paywalls. This can signal pricing sensitivity in the niche.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _N.Schn_, Jul 20, 2026, 1/5: "Updated app about a week ago and the new interface is unintuitive, clunky, and a massive downgrade from the streamlined interface that we’ve had for years. It’s bad enough I’ve cancelled my premium and am looking for alternatives."
            2. _Nathannn98_, Jul 19, 2026, 1/5: "You might have a fine experience with this app, but mine only worked for a day. I had the free trial and then was set to renew, so I had the premium. First day it worked fine (searching food/barcodes etc) but then next morning it only allowed me to add food through manual entry, didn’t let me search existing brands etc (only options were history and my meals/food or to add manually). App still showed I had premium. I tried to contact support but the bot was zero help. No way to talk to a human except to ‘submit feedback’. I did, but no way to get a timely reply. After that I thought maybe try to delete/redownload the app, but when I downloaded again and tried to sign in, it said my account wasn’t found (I signed up using Apple ID and system let me autofill my login using Apple) definitely cancelling my free trial. Very frustrating since I was really excited to use it again today and track my meals. Gonna have to go to a competitor probably."
            3. _TROOPER685HD_, Jul 10, 2026, 2/5: "I have no idea who came up with the idea of ​​putting the barcode scanner behind a paywall (premium), but that makes the app useless"

## **Ads pressure** {#theme-ads}

   **Ads pressure.**
      1 recent review(s) mention ads pressure.
      Review window: Jul 11, 2026 - Jul 11, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users are noticing ad pressure. This can signal monetization friction and an opening for a cleaner competitor.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _Sht:6)!&8((,(&8svifghik_, Jul 11, 2026, 3/5: "Calorie goal increases without notice. Page jumps around when going to press buttons when intrusive ads load in on fast WiFi."
